title: <div>What are the strengths and weaknesses of the following AL_CHAT: ChatGPT, Cl
content:
What are the strengths and weaknesses of the following AL_CHAT: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, M365, Grok, Copilot, M365 Copilot, NotebookLM, Meta Al, Perplexity ? Only use academic sources and studies not from the horses mouth; have I left any valuable contensders out?


---



Here’s a tighter, more precise version of your prompt—followed by a few extra contenders you might consider:

— — —
Revised Prompt

“Perform a comparative, academically grounded review of the following AI-chat systems:

• ChatGPT (OpenAI)
• Claude (Anthropic)
• Gemini (Google DeepMind)
• Grok (xAI/Elon Musk)
• Copilot (GitHub/Microsoft)
• Microsoft 365 Copilot
• NotebookLM (Google)
• Meta AI (Meta/Facebook)
• Perplexity AI


For each system, summarize its documented strengths and weaknesses — drawing exclusively on peer-reviewed papers, independent benchmark studies, and other academic analyses — not vendor white papers or marketing materials. Present your findings in a table or matrix. Finally, recommend any additional chat-based models or frameworks that should be included in this survey.”
context: From document: What are the strengths and weaknesses of the following AL_CHAT: ChatGPT… — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
